scripts.test:e2e: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e-footer: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/footer/
scripts.test:e2e-unauth: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/unauthorizedUser/
scripts.test:e2e-academicAdmin: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/academicAdmin/
scripts.test:e2e-contentCreator: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/contentCreator/
scripts.test:e2e-contentEditor: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/contentEditor/
scripts.test:e2e-faculty: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/faculty/
scripts.test:e2e-systemAdmin: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/systemAdmin/
scripts.test:e2e-user: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/user/
scripts.test:e2e-websiteCreator: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test e2e/websiteCreator/
scripts.save:unauth: cd e2e/unauthorizedUser && npx playwright codegen https://dev.khouryodyssey.org/ --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:user: cd e2e/user && npx playwright codegen https://dev.khouryodyssey.org/ --save-storage=auth.json
